properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v4 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My God and I go in the fields together We walk and talk as good friends should and do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We clasp our hands, our voices ring with laughter My God and I walk through the meadows few

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My God and I will go for aye together We'll walk and talk as good friends should and do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This earth will pass, and with it common trifles But God and I will go unendingly
